verdicts.title: RBAC is default-permissive and nothing enables enforcement
verdicts.note: rbac.py:42 defaults RBAC_MODE to 'audit' (denies pass through unless is_enforce, rbac.py:155-160,175-180); grep found zero RBAC_MODE in deploy/, docker-compose, Makefile, or deployment_profile.py, and prod compose sets only BACKEND_ENVIRONMENT=production.

verdicts.title: PostgresSiweStore has zero production consumers
verdicts.note: desktop_app.py (the only Postgres root, targeted by docker-compose.prod.yml:105 via desktop_app:app) has no siwe reference; its kwargs dict (desktop_app.py:189-235) wires 20+ Postgres stores but not siwe_store, and siwe is absent from the 'accepted gap' list (154-173) though PostgresSiweStore exists (siwe_store.py:145), so app.py:723 falls back to InMemorySiweStore.

verdicts.title: SIWE EIP-4361 template hand-maintained in three places, docs say two
verdicts.note: Byte-identical template copies verified in siwe.py:290-302, apps/frontend/src/features/auth/siweMessage.ts:30-41, and apps/desktop/main/auth/local-login.ts:78-91, while root CLAUDE.md documents only the siweMessage.ts + siwe.py pair.

verdicts.title: Compact HMAC bearer codec exists three times
verdicts.note: _BearerCodec sign+verify in sessions.py:88-141, sign-only in dev_idp/_sign.py:26-38, verify+sign in backend_facade/auth.py:382-413,502-511; dev_idp/routes.py:142-149 hand-types literal claim keys (incl. 'iat', absent from copilot_service_contracts.auth_claims) instead of the CLAIM_* constants.

verdicts.title: Two parallel dev-mint mechanisms with different security properties
verdicts.note: dev_idp/routes.py:35,141 mints a 365-day (_DEV_BEARER_TTL) session-less bearer with no sid claim, while routes/sessions.py:131-160 -> sessions.py:257-280 dev_mint issues a session-backed 24h (ttl_seconds=86400) bearer via create() gated by dev_mint_allowed.

verdicts.title: Backend image default CMD wires amnesiac in-memory identity
verdicts.note: Dockerfile:31 CMD is backend_app.app:app whose defaults are InMemoryIdentityStore/InMemorySessionStore (app.py:493,402); the only production fail-closed guards are TokenVaultFactory and the email dispatcher (app.py:356) — no guard refuses in-memory identity/session stores, and only docker-compose.prod.yml:105 overrides CMD to desktop_app:app.

verdicts.title: settings/schema.sql duplicates migration 0033 DDL and is unread
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is without deep verification per instructions.

verdicts.title: RBAC dependency layer duplicated between backend and ai-backend
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is without deep verification per instructions.

verdicts.title: LocalTokenVault.decrypt catches broad Exception, masks wrong-backend errors
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is without deep verification per instructions.

verdicts.title: Service-token compare uses != instead of compare_digest
verdicts.note: Low severity accepted as-is without deep verification per instructions.
